# Wooden Lyre

> [!tip] 👑 Attachment · Cost: **2** · Leadership

![[307008.png]]

*Item. Instrument.*

---

Attach to a (Leadership) or **_Minstrel_** hero. Restricted.
**Action**: Exhaust an **_Instrument_** attachment to give a character defending an attack +1 DEF for that attack.
